subject: [HOLMES] Fixed the Daily Healchcheck Problem
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Fixed the Daily Healchcheck Problem

Fixed the daily healthcheck problem caused by the MSB registration failure.

Issue-ID: HOLMES-536
Signed-off-by: GuangrongFu <fu.guangrong@zte.com.cn>
Change-Id: Ia69a1b6185e4a6cab56061d1d168d783d67508f1

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5234/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5234/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 83 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Fixed the daily healthcheck failure problem caused by the MSB registration failure. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5234/ )
